zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes於大約1122年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼時，他的父親Nicholas de Rumigny29歲，母親Adelise de Hainault29歲。他於大約1150年與Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem在比利時海瑙特艾福雷斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年2月在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes于大约1122年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼时，他的父亲Nicholas de Rumigny29岁，母亲Adelise de Hainault29岁。他于大约1150年与Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem在比利时海瑙特艾福雷斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1179年2月在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nicolao
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes was born about 1122, in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Nicholas de Rumigny, was 29 and his mother, Adelise de Hainault, was 29. He married Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem about 1150, in Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died in February 1179, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes est né environ 1122, à Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Nicholas de Rumigny, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Hainault, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem environ 1150, à Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en février 1179, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes um 1122 in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Rumigny 29 und seine Mutter Adelise de Hainault 29. Er hat um 1150 in Chièvres, Hennegau, Belgien Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1179 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes è nato il circa 1122 nel Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Nicholas de Rumigny, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Adelise de Hainault, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem circa 1150, nel Chièvres, Hainaut, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1179, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennesが約1122年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスルミグニーで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Rumignyは29歳，母Adelise de Hainaultは29歳であった。約1150年にベルギーヘイナトチevレスでEva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghemと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1179年2月に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes(이)가 대략 1122년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 럼익니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Rumigny(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelise de Hainault(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 벨기에 하인오트 치e브레스에서 Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 2월 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes nasceu aproximadamente 1122, em Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Nicholas de Rumigny, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Hainault, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem aproximadamente 1150, em Chièvres, Hainaut, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1179, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes родился около 1122 г. в местности румигни, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Rumigny было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Hainault, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem около 1150 г. в местности чиeвресь, ханаут, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер февраль 1179 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes nació aproximadamente 1122, en Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Nicholas de Rumigny, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Adelise de Hainault, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem aproximadamente 1150, en Chièvres, Hainaut, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1179, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
